name: Reclaimed Settler
visual_description: A weathered human settler in practical frontier clothing kneels among scattered salvage, examining a piece of salvaged metal or tool in their hands. Worn leather, earth tones, and dappled sunlight suggest a lived-in landscape. Their posture conveys focused determination and resourcefulness.
full_prompt: A weathered human settler in practical frontier clothing kneels among scattered scavenge ancient technology, examining a piece of salvaged metal or tool in their hands. Worn leather, earth tones, and dappled sunlight suggest a lived-in landscape. Their posture conveys focused determination and resourcefulness.. Stylized digital illustration, structured balanced composition, warm sandstone and ivory tones, golden-hour lighting with long shadows, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
